task_completion.description: Accept all tracked changes in the document
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Review' tab in Microsoft Word, interaction with the 'Accept' button/dropdown, and selection of 'Accept All Changes', or the visible disappearance of redline tracked changes in the document text.

Screenshots showing the 'Review' tab, interaction with the 'Delete' button in the Comments section, and selection of 'Delete All Comments in Document', or the visible disappearance of comment bubbles in the document margins.

task_completion.description: Remove all personal information and document metadata
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'File' -> 'Info' screen, the 'Document Inspector' dialog box open, and the 'Remove All' button being clicked specifically next to 'Document Properties and Personal Information'.
Screenshots showing the 'Save As' dialog box in Microsoft Word with 'Final_Public_Release.docx' typed into the File name field.

task_completion.description: Save the file in the 'Documents' folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Save As' dialog box with 'Documents' selected in the left navigation pane or visible in the address bar at the top of the dialog.

integrity.description: Agent used the Microsoft Word GUI to sanitize the document
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with Microsoft Word's ribbons, menus, and dialog boxes rather than using terminal commands, PowerShell, or Python scripts to manipulate the .docx file.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Document Inspector tool
integrity.visual_evidence: The genuine Microsoft Word 'Document Inspector' popup window is visible, rather than the agent just manually deleting text on the page and claiming metadata is removed.

integrity.description: Agent saved a new file rather than just renaming the old one in File Explorer
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses the 'Save As' feature within Microsoft Word instead of navigating to File Explorer and simply renaming 'Draft_Policy_Paper.docx' to 'Final_Public_Release.docx'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output filename is exactly 'Final_Public_Release.docx'. The original document contains metadata with the author name 'Internal Reviewer' which must be completely removed during the sanitization process.
